records.ety: [L. numisma, nomisma, a piece of money, coin, fr. Gr. <?/ anything sanctioned by usage, the current coin, fr. <?/ to introduce a custom, or usage, fr. no`mos a custom, or usage, fr. ne`mein to distribute, assign: cf. F. numismatique. See Nomad.]

defs: Of or pertaining to coins; relating to the science of coins or medals.
